summary: Tested Rounds CRUD (active flag, uniqueness, in_use guard, rename cascade, restore) and College Schedules feature (HR admin CRUD + public candidate form with auto-attached schedule). Backend: 9/10 pytest passed, 1 skipped (no in-use round candidate available for hard-delete-block validation in current DB). Frontend: HR page /college-schedules and public form /register/college both work end-to-end including dropdown filtering, alert validation, submission with auto-schedule confirmation card. Routing precedence /register/college vs /register/:formId works correctly.

minor.issue: Unrelated background queue worker crashes with KeyError('file_type') on legacy queue rows — visible in backend.err.log, not blocking but error-spammy

action_items: Optional: investigate the legacy bg-queue KeyError('file_type') in server.py:2095 — unrelated to this feature but pollutes logs.

Optional: the rounds 'hard delete blocked when in-use' branch was not exercisable in current DB (no test-deletable in-use round). Functional logic verified by code review and backend lifecycle test passes.
critical_code_review_comments: CollegeRegistration.js useEffect setting scheduleInfo runs on every (college,role) change but has a stale-closure exhaustive-deps disable comment — harmless but noted.

bb_modules.py register_college_applicant() uses upsert by email — same email registering twice (different college/role) overwrites prior record silently. This was confirmed in test by reusing Anna University + AI/ML; works as designed (per main agent note) but worth flagging for product clarity.
Public endpoint /api/pub/college-form/register has no rate-limiting or CAPTCHA — could be spammed publicly. Consider basic throttle / honeypot. Not blocking.
JWT_SECRET in backend/.env is only 8 bytes — InsecureKeyLengthWarning on every login. Pre-existing, unrelated to this iteration.
Rounds rename cascade test only validated via API on a fresh round (not in-use). The 2,763-row cascade was smoke-tested by main agent already — no regression seen.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* and TESTPUB_* college schedules via pytest, all hard-deleted in fixture teardown. UI test created UI_TestCollege_003920 — cleaned up after testing. Existing seed (Anna University + 2 roles, VIT Vellore + AI/ML, college_test_1@example.com pipeline_data record) preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows for iteration 38 (Rounds upgrade + College Schedules + Public college form) verified passing. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration38_rounds_college.py is reusable for regression. Test data is cleaned. The unrelated _bg_queue_worker KeyError('file_type') in backend.err.log is pre-existing legacy-queue bug, not from this iteration. JWT_SECRET length warning is also pre-existing.

rounds_backend: PUT rename (cascade not directly verified due to ephemeral round, code-reviewed)
DELETE ?hard=true succeeds when not in use
DELETE ?hard=true blocked when in-use — SKIPPED (no in-use round available)
frontend_hr_page: 3 seed rows render with Active badges
Add modal opens, fills, saves, closes
frontend_public_form: Selecting Anna University filters role dropdown to 2 roles only
Submit without selection shows alert 'Please select both College and Job Role'
Submit with valid selection shows confirmation card with college/role/date(15/06/2026)/time(10:00 AM)
Schedule notice 'Your interview slot will be auto-assigned by HR' visible
routing_regression: /register/ai-ml correctly resolves to slug-based PublicRegistration (not College Registration)
